title: How to change status when another status does not change?
excerpt:
Hi! 
I need to change a status to: ‘Plan session’ when there is no entry for a date in column ‘Date session 2’ and another status is ‘2 sessions’. This way I can directly see when I need to plan a new session for our tra…

posts.author: Tijs (Tijs Metternich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I need to change a status to: ‘Plan session’ when there is no entry for a date in column ‘Date session 2’ and another status is ‘2 sessions’. This way I can directly see when I need to plan a new session for our training company.

Maybe it’s possible, but I don’t see any solutions regarding to when a status does not change. Someone with a solution maybe?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
You are correct, you need some event to trigger the second session. Maybe first session completed?

“When session changes to completed, and session package is 2 sessions and session 2 date is empty, then set session to schedule second session”
